utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 1) property: includes selected property with details and price (name, address, price, bedrooms, features) — fully specified. 2) financing: includes solution with terms (type, down payment %, amount, mortgage amount, rate range, term, arrangement fee) — fully specified. 3) legal_services: includes legal services with costs (package, estimated_cost, disbursements estimate) — fully specified. 4) moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (type and estimated_cost) — fully specified. 5) setup_services: utility and setup services (package, connection fees, estimated monthly costs) — fully specified. 6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown (itemized costs and totals with ranges and calculations) — fully specified.
